errorCodes.RE3DATA_NOT_FOUND: A repository you searched for couldn't be found.
errorCodes.RE3DATA_NOT_AVAILABLE: The Re3Data repository service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errorCodes.RE3DATA_UNEXPECTED_ERROR: The Re3Data repository service is currently unavailable due to an unexpected error. Please try again later.
errorCodes.RE3DATA_RECOMMENDED_NOT_FOUND: A recommended repository couldn't be found.
errorCodes.RE3DATA_RECOMMENDED_NOT_AVAILABLE: Failure while fetching recommended repositories. The Re3Data repository service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errorCodes.RE3DATA_RECOMMENDED_UNEXPECTED_ERROR: Failure while fetching recommended repositories. The Re3Data repository service is currently unavailable due to an unexpected error. Please try again later.
errorCodes.ORCID_PERSON_NOT_FOUND: A person you searched for with ORCID couldn't be found.
errorCodes.ORCID_NOT_AVAILABLE: The ORCID person service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errorCodes.ORCID_UNEXPECTED_ERROR: The ORCID person service is currently unavailable due to an unexpected error. Please try again later.
errorCodes.FITS_NOT_AVAILABLE: The file analysis service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errorCodes.FITS_UNEXPECTED_ERROR: The file analysis service is currently unavailable due to an unexpected error. Please try again later.
errorCodes.OPENAIRE_NOT_FOUND: A dataset you searched for couldn't be found.
errorCodes.OPENAIRE_NOT_AVAILABLE: The OpenAire dataset service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errorCodes.OPENAIRE_UNEXPECTED_ERROR: The OpenAire dataset service is currently unavailable due to an unexpected error. Please try again later.
errorCodes.GOTENBERG_NOT_AVAILABLE: The PDF export service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errorCodes.GOTENBERG_UNEXPECTED_ERROR: The PDF export service is currently unavailable due to an unexpected error. Please try again later.
errorCodes.PURE_NOT_FOUND: A person or project you searched for with PURE couldn't be found.
errorCodes.PURE_NOT_AVAILABLE: The Pure person and project service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
errorCodes.PURE_UNEXPECTED_ERROR: The Pure person and project service is currently unavailable due to an unexpected error. Please try again later.

error.0: Service can not be reached, please retry later. If the issue persists contact [insert contact for technical issue].
error.404: The requested resource could not be found.
error.500: An error occurred, please contact [insert contact for technical issue].
error.503: Service is currently unavailable, please retry later.

storageErrors.stillInUse: Storage is used in at least one DMP and therefore cannot be deleted.
storageErrors.lastTranslation: The last translation for a given storage cannot be deleted.
storageErrors.invalidUrl: The provided URL is not valid.

error.document: An unexpected error occurred while generating your document. If the issue persists contact [insert contact for technical issue].
